ast.name: textContent
ast.source: press any key to change your current one. close this window to cancel
ast.target: 按任意键更改当前设置。关闭此窗口以取消

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum delay between two presses of the respective key in 1/10 of a second
ast.target: 两个按键之间最大延迟时间是1/10秒

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: all shortcuts you have currently set up
ast.target: 您当前设置的所有快捷键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: the corresponding plugin has been disabled or uninstalled
ast.target: 对应的插件已被禁用或卸载

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: depending on how fast you type a too high number might annoy you
ast.target: 根据您打字的速度，设置一个过高的数值可能会让您感到烦恼
